user_query: Which city have both Jean and John visited?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Session[atom(content =~ "visited travel city")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "city visited") and atom(content =~ "Jean") and atom(content =~ "John")])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Session[atom(content =~ "visited travel city")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "city visited") and atom(content =~ "Jean") and atom(content =~ "John")]
